title: Gate-state report: inherited docs-memory tree is HARD on napkin only
body: Inherited-tree fitness gate report: practice:fitness:informational exited 0 with HARD (1 hard, 20 soft); practice:fitness --strict-hard exited 1 with the same HARD result. Failure surface: .agent/memory/active/napkin.md lines 327 / target 220 / limit 300, chars and prose-line checks green. Diagnosis: latest dense session learning pushed active napkin just past hard line limit; no critical files. Proposed next step: open a narrow files claim and home the newest dense entry into a live pending-graduations shard, preserving the full text and replacing the napkin body with a disposition pointer. No comms files will be moved or deleted.
